title: ageratina gracilis
intro: Ageratina gracilis, also known as Mexican oregano or Hierba del Toro, is a shrubby herb belonging to the mint family and native to Mexico and Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Ageratina gracilis include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Ageratina gracilis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or mixing with a solvent like ethanol.
